items.title: Providers can enumerate open biz dates
items.description: The source provider abstraction exposes open biz date enumeration so sync can plan a historical range instead of only pulling one target day.

items.title: Sync supports minimal historical backfill
items.description: market_data.sync accepts a start/end biz date range and writes source-backed snapshots for each open biz date in that range.

items.title: Backfill is idempotent for existing biz dates
items.description: Rerunning the same backfill range skips already ingested biz dates instead of creating duplicate same-day snapshots by default.

items.title: Live backfill works with a real Tushare token
items.description: A real Tushare token can backfill a recent isolated date range into DuckDB and rerun the same range without duplicating biz dates.
